description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 16, 2025 at 12:57 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Ilona Avenue near Fox Hills Drive.  
 
The Waymo AV was parked in-lane with hazard lights activated, facing northeastbound on Ilona Avenue due to a prior collision. An SUV 
travelling northeast on Ilona Avenue approached the Waymo AV from behind, and began to pass the Waymo AV on the left. As the SUV 
passed the parked Waymo AV, the passenger side of the SUV made contact with the rear driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. Both vehicles sustained damage. 
 
Print
Clear Form
